result.summary: Found 3 issues: one major layout overlap, one minor content truncation, and one minor accessibility concern.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' floating button is overlapping and obscuring the legal disclaimer/fine print text at the bottom of the page. Important terms and conditions text is being cut off on both sides of the button.
issues.suggestion: Reposition the 'SCROLL DOWN' button above the disclaimer text, or place the disclaimer below the button to ensure full legal text is visible and readable without obstruction.

issues.description: The fine print disclaimer text is very small and low contrast against the white background, and additionally is partially obscured by the overlaid button, making it nearly impossible to read.
issues.suggestion: Increase font size and contrast ratio of the disclaimer text to meet WCAG AA standards (minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio), and ensure no UI elements overlap it.

issues.description: The bottom navigation bar icons (Casino, Live Casino, Sports, Poker, Promos, Support) appear slightly cramped and unevenly spaced on the mobile viewport, with 'Sports' label appearing to lack an icon while others have icons.
issues.suggestion: Ensure all navigation items have consistent icon and label sizing with equal spacing across the bottom navigation bar.
